title: Gravy Boat & Saucer Set Porcelain Christmas Holly Serving Sauce Dish Dinnerware
features: The gravy boat and saucer features a holiday-themed design on the rim and a poinsettia design in the centre.
Made from durable and elegant porcelain material with a smooth and glossy finish.
Includes both a gravy boat and a matching saucer in the set.
Approx. Dimensions: Gravy Boat - D:8.5 x W: 19.5 cm / Saucer - Dia:12 x W: 21 cm
description: This gravy boat and saucer is a beautiful addition to any Christmas collection, made of grade AB porcelain and decorated with a Christmas Holly design. A thoughtful and practical gift during the holiday season.
